who: logistics operations managers processing 10-20 fuel card transactions/month
offer: For logistics operations managers processing 10-20 fuel card transactions/month, inaccurate fuel expense reporting causes cash flow gaps. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate fuel expense reporting due to untracked mileage logs.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics operations managers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to logistics operations managers with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools and solutions
try_it: Let users try manual entry of fuel card transactions
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Short demo video of the manual workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly updates in relevant communities
